prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划继续小幅缩招（竞争略缓解）、学校985/211层次优势及计算机/电子信息等热门专业高热度，在2025年基准13271名基础上，M 3供需弹性主值指向12846名（缩招使位次前移），但考虑热门专业吸引力和学校层次带来的竞争支撑，小幅上调30名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约12876名，区间12376–13376名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10607 → 11816 → 12891 → 13240 → 13271, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2664 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 13271, with a slowing pace of backward shift.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category plan was 92 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 81 in 2023–2024, and further reduced to 75 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 71 students, a continued slight reduction of about 5.3% compared to 2025, with the reduction trend continuing, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the top 40 in recent years, with a clear level positioning; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 82nd, evaluated as average, with short video exposure at a medium-low level; no history of enrollment gaps; relying on Northeastern University's discipline system, 6 disciplines including Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Software Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Metallurgical Engineering (A) are rated A- or above; the enrollment majors such as Computer Class, Automation Class, and Electronic Information Class all correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is about 200,000, estimated at about 143,600 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 71.8%, roughly the same as 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 368 points in 2024 and 367 points in 2025, remaining stable; the university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, with an enrollment proportion in Liaoning Province of about 3.69% (96/2602 in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; local candidates have a high recognition of this university, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued slight reduction in the 2026 plan (slightly easing competition), the university's 985/211 level advantage, and the high popularity of hot majors like Computer/Electronic Information, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 13271, the M3 supply-demand elasticity main value points to 12846 (reduction causing ranking to move forward), but considering the attractiveness of hot majors and the competitive support brought by the university level, a slight upward adjustment of 30 positions; the predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 12876, with a range of 12376–13376.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation Class (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Class (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Instrument Class (Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Intelligent Perception Engineering
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering)
- Economics Class (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- E-commerce
- Foreign Languages and Literature Class (English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12376–13376, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 12300), focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation Class; for rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., outside 13300), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety and carefully choose Tier 1 majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus identity disputes, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, evaluated as average; no history of admission gaps; relying on Northeastern University's academic system, with advantageous disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), mainly engineering; History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Ethnology, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines; Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in 2026, it ranks 38th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, stable in the top 40 in recent years, with a clear level positioning.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The school is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, with about 3.69% of its enrollment in Liaoning Province (96/2602 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; local candidates have a high recognition of the school, with no obvious regional preference deviation; Economics/Finance/Finance and Economics 2024–2026 show differentiation and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see, Business Administration clearly discouraged; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with an estimated 28.2% in History Category, about 56,400, roughly the same as 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 400 in 2024 and 437 in 2025, showing an increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (increased competition), the 985/211 level advantage but low correlation between History Category enrollment majors and advantageous disciplines, and the differentiated or average social popularity of related majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 2475, but considering the general popularity of History Category majors limiting application appeal, a slight downward adjustment of 20 places; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2738, with a range of 2327–3149.
